summary: Tested the real-time review feature: Write a Review button, ReviewForm, star picker, validation, form submission, backend POST/GET /api/reviews, and admin approval flow. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Customer and TEST_ApproveCustomer reviews during testing (pending status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review feature fully tested and working. Backend: POST /api/reviews creates pending, GET /api/reviews returns approved only, admin PUT /api/admin/reviews/{id} approves reviews. Frontend: Write a Review button (data-testid=write-review-btn), form with star picker, validation toasts, success card with Thank You! message all verified on 390x844 mobile viewport.
